original_image_tags: Two black circular punch-holes are visible at the top margin of the page.

elements.description: Typed government memorandum regarding 'Flying Discs', dated August 14, 1947. Includes handwritten annotations 'ENCLOSURE' and '62-83894-105' at the bottom, and a stamped label 'COPIES DESTROYED 270 NOV 18 1964' in the bottom left corner. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree there are no photographs or diagrams, but they differ on the presence of punch-holes versus handwritten annotations/stamps without contradicting each other's visual claims.
